trending_topics: Short-form edutainment content (bite-sized training tips and technique guides)
Women-specific multisport/swimwear gear design and performance
Community-driven engagement and user-generated content over performative social posting
Open water swimming events and local competition participation
Authentic behind-the-scenes content showing brand personality
content_angle: Leverage the April 2026 NZ Age Group Swimming Championships (April 8-12) and The Mount Swim open water event (April 18) to create timely training prep content — short technique tips paired with community spotlights of athletes training for these events
key_insight: Authenticity and community-focused engagement are replacing performative social media — position Velocx as a coach/mentor brand rather than purely a product vendor, with short actionable tips tied to upcoming NZ swim events.
